role: ENGINE-INF E0 confirmatory-holdout source (design docs/next/design/engine-inference-under-typing.md §2.5 [R1], ASM-2104/2110): SemCor 3.0 sense-tagged Brown corpus (brown1/brown2/brownv), the third-party sentence corpus from which the unseen holdout H1/H2/H3 items are extracted mechanically. The corpus predates the programme (Brown corpus 1961-64; SemCor tagging 1993-2003, Princeton/Mihalcea). PINNED AS THE ZIP: the extractor reads semcor.zip directly and verifies this sha256 before any byte is consumed.

source.distribution: NLTK data 'semcor' package (XML conversion of SemCor 3.0; brown1 + brown2 + brownv concordances)
source.note: Primary mirror web.eecs.umich.edu/~mihalcea (semcor3.0.tar.gz) was TLS-unreachable from this box at pin time; the NLTK conversion carries the same brown1/brown2/brownv tagfiles with sense keys as lemma+lexsn attributes. Sense keys are version-stable and map to WN3.1 offsets through the ALREADY-PINNED data/lexical-wn31 index.sense (unmappable keys are logged exclusions, ASM-2104).

license: SemCor: Princeton WordNet license (see LICENSE inside the zip); Brown corpus text as distributed with SemCor 3.0.
custody: Entered the repo AFTER the K-lemma collapse modules and the C-SHUF orbit manifest were pinned (design §2.5 custody clause 1) and BEFORE any holdout outcome exists. No engine or scorer runs on holdout items pre-freeze (ASM-2104).
